name: part_010

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine speaks to the audience after performing a song, reflecting on the theme of self-acceptance.
A promotional video for Pavolia Reine's membership, 'The Royaltea', featuring various rewards and perks.
Pavolia Reine performs 'Figure It Out' while playing a bass guitar on stage.
